title.en: The sevenfold Dao realms of Taisu Palace are di...

content.en:
If Ye Tian is sure that Ye Tian has not fallen, then there is still hope for rescue.

But the premise is that the battlefield array is withdrawn, but this is afraid that it will take a long time, and it needs to wait until the Supreme Dao Void Demon completely abandons the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, and the Taisu Palace has the authority before he can apply for the revocation of the battlefield array.

And if you want to do this, I'm afraid you have to overthrow the Wuji Heavenly Palace, otherwise you will never be able to do it.

this day.

The sevenfold Dao realms of Taisu Palace are discussing again.

"Everyone, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor is back, and he will attack Ye Tianjun of our Taisu Palace as soon as possible, at present, all Ye Tianjun's clones have been killed, and his body has been sealed in the Origin Realm, and he cannot come out for the time being. "

"It is very likely that Ye Tian has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao, if this is really the case, then Ye Tian will definitely have the combat power of the sevenfold supreme dao realm in the future, and it can also greatly enhance our strength. Taisu Palace Master said.

Another Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm said: "I learned from one of the Supreme Dao Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor constantly urged the Taiyi Roulette Wheel to move on the Ye Tian clone of the battlefield ruins in the air, causing the Wuji Heavenly Emperor to be attacked by the Heaven and Earth Origin Origin, and he was injured and is currently recuperating. "

When the Taisu Palace Lord heard this, he was immediately overjoyed: "The Wuji Heavenly Emperor is injured? In this case, can we launch the plan in advance, maybe we can increase the hope of another percent!"

After hearing this, the other Sevenfold Dao Realm also felt that they could give it a go.

"Then take advantage of this opportunity to launch this plan, I will contact the other Sevenfold Dao Realms, but they will definitely not do it first, and they will have to wait for the Wuji Heavenly Emperor to be sealed before they will help us to fight against the Wuji Heavenly Palace together. "Taisu Palace Master said.

And just like that, the plan was decided.

Soon after, the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of the other forces agreed, and they all made a Supreme Dao oath that no one would leak out.

......

Airplanes!

Taisu Palace used a special large array to summon a phantom.

This phantom is a young man in a green robe, but it is just an illusory shadow, and it seems to contain terrifying coercion.

If the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was here, he would recognize that this person was the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm powerhouse of the Wuji Domain, the Taibai Sword Master!

Although the Taibai Sword Lord was only in the Sixfold Dao Realm, his strength was even stronger than that of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor.

The Taibai Sword Master, like Ye Tian, took the path of the strongest to the Dao, and his cultivation reached the peak realm of the sixth-fold Dao realm, and he was only one step away from the seventh-fold Dao realm.

However, the Taibai Sword Master did not comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, if he comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, then he would be able to be truly invincible in the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and he would even be able to easily escape under the weaker Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

Moreover, it is precisely because of the path of the strongest to the Dao that he has taken, his bottleneck is extremely strong, and if he does not comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao, he will not be able to break the bottleneck and advance to the Seventh Rank Dao realm.

The other Supreme Dao Realms only need to comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao before they can impact the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

Of course, taking the road of the strongest to the road, the combat effectiveness in the later stage is very terrifying, and the early stage can cross the three major realms.

However, in the later stage, it is impossible to cross the three major realms.

The Taibai Sword Lord couldn't easily kill the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and he didn't dare to kill it, but he dared to seal it.

"Taisu, what are you looking for me?"

The Taibai Sword Lord asked.

The Taisu Palace Lord immediately said: "Taibai Sword Master, the plan I told you about before is ready to start!"

"Is this going to be advanced?" the Taibai Sword Lord smiled, "It doesn't matter, just advance in advance, I will rush back as soon as possible." But I have to say it in advance, I will only make a move once, and after I make a move, I don't owe you a favor. Moreover, I can only seal the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and I can't kill him, otherwise the group of guys in the Innate Origin Alliance will be afraid that they will trouble me. If you do lose, I won't make a move. If you win, I will speak for you and let your Taisu Palace take charge of the Infinite Domain. "

"Thank you, Taibai Sword Master!"

The Taisu Palace Lord said gratefully.

She didn't have a deep relationship with the Taibai Sword Lord, but when the Taibai Sword Lord encountered danger at the beginning of her rise, she helped the Taibai Sword Lord and personally sent him out of the Infinite Domain.

Otherwise, the Taibai Sword Master would not have been able to grow to this level.

It's a pity that the Taibai Sword Lord didn't have a good encounter in the Wuji Domain, so he has no feelings for the Wuji Domain, and he has long been out of the Wuji Domain.

Otherwise, the Taibai Sword Lord would not come back at all.

......

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian didn't know what was going on in the outside world, and at this time, he was ready to attack the peak realm of the Double Dao Realm.

"Heaven and earth origin gift, come!"

Rumble!!!!

In a single thought, a large amount of heaven and earth origin descended.

This Heaven and Earth Origin Descend cannot even be isolated from the Infinite Trapped Heaven Array, if it can isolate the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift, then it is not something that the Infinite Heavenly Emperor can do!

A large number of origins came, allowing Ye Tian's cultivation to continue to improve.

After a long time.

His cultivation had finally reached the peak realm of the Double Dao Realm.

And after thoroughly absorbing these origins, his cultivation to the Triple Dao Realm was considered to have reached a limit, and the next step was to impact the Triple Dao Realm.

With his attainments in comprehending the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao, it is naturally not difficult to impact the triple supreme dao realm, but it also needs to be impacted again and again before there is any hope of breaking through.

And just like that, time passed.

As for the outside world, Taisu Palace is also secretly preparing, but except for the Sevenfold Dao Realm, the other Dao realms don't know that there will be a big war coming.

this day.

The Taisu Palace Master received a summons.

"The Taibai Sword Lord has arrived in the Infinite Domain!"

Taisu Palace was slightly nervous.

Finally this day has come, and this time it is either the complete destruction of the Taisu Palace, or the destruction of the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

For the first time, she let those weak Taisu Palace to the Dao Realm enter the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, which was also a kind of protection in disguise.

Once a war starts, the outside world will be more dangerous than the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

It is conceivable that the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm is desperate to fight, and the aftermath alone can kill many Supreme Dao Realms.

Therefore, the battlefield of the True Dao Domain is a safe haven.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor was healing, but he received a message from the Taisu Palace, and he was immediately furious.

"Damn Taisu Palace, dare to rebel!!!"

He had just received the news that Taisu Palace had attacked a station in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, one of the Sixfold Dao Realms was killed, five of the Fifth Rank Dao Realms fell, and many of the Seventh Dao Realms had died at the hands of a Sevenfold Dao Realm of the Taisu Palace.

"Taisu Palace, I didn't bother to pay attention to you, I didn't expect you to dare to jump!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor was ready to directly destroy the Taisu Palace.

Although this is done, there will be a lot less cannon fodder when the next catastrophe comes, but if such an act that angers the Infinite Heavenly Palace is not destroyed, won't the other forces also rebel.

Rumble!

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor stepped out of the Wuji Heavenly Palace and went straight to the Taisu Palace.
